_comment: PF1e familiars data (CRB 5th Printing pp. 82-83 for base list, p. 127 for Improved Familiar). Each base entry lists the master bonus granted by the familiar. Improved familiar entries reference a monsters.json row via `monsterRef` (exact name match) where possible. Phase 7.1 data layer.

baseFamiliars.name: Bat
baseFamiliars.description: A tiny winged mammal that navigates by echolocation. Grants the master a +3 bonus on Fly checks.

baseFamiliars.name: Cat
baseFamiliars.description: A common house cat, silent and watchful. Grants the master a +3 bonus on Stealth checks.

baseFamiliars.name: Hawk

masterBonus.condition: sight-based and opposed Perception checks in bright light

baseFamiliars.description: A sharp-eyed raptor of open country. Grants the master a +3 bonus on sight-based and opposed Perception checks in bright light.

baseFamiliars.name: Lizard
baseFamiliars.description: A small reptile that clings to walls and ceilings. Grants the master a +3 bonus on Climb checks.

baseFamiliars.name: Monkey
baseFamiliars.description: A nimble primate with dextrous hands. Grants the master a +3 bonus on Acrobatics checks.

baseFamiliars.name: Owl

masterBonus.condition: sight-based and opposed Perception checks in shadows or darkness

baseFamiliars.description: A silent nocturnal hunter. Grants the master a +3 bonus on sight-based and opposed Perception checks in shadows or darkness.

baseFamiliars.name: Rat
baseFamiliars.description: A resilient scavenger. Grants the master a +2 bonus on Fortitude saves.

baseFamiliars.name: Raven
baseFamiliars.specialAbility: A raven familiar can speak one language of its master's choice as a supernatural ability.
baseFamiliars.description: A clever black bird with a keen eye for value. Grants the master a +3 bonus on Appraise checks, and can speak one language as a supernatural ability.

baseFamiliars.name: Viper
baseFamiliars.description: A venomous serpent. Grants the master a +3 bonus on Bluff checks.

baseFamiliars.name: Toad
baseFamiliars.description: A small amphibian with a preternatural tie to its master's life force. Grants the master +3 hit points.

baseFamiliars.name: Weasel
baseFamiliars.description: A swift, quick-reflexed mustelid. Grants the master a +2 bonus on Reflex saves.

improvedFamiliars.name: Celestial Hawk
improvedFamiliars.footnote: Or any other celestial animal from the standard familiar list.

improvedFamiliars.name: Fiendish Viper
improvedFamiliars.footnote: Or any other fiendish animal from the standard familiar list.

improvedFamiliars.name: Homunculus
improvedFamiliars.prerequisite: The master must first create the homunculus.
